steps.title: Read the parabola
steps.content: From the graph, the parabola opens upward, so the leading coefficient is positive: $y = \tfrac{7}{16}x^2$ (not negative). That eliminates (A) and (B).

steps.title: Read the line
steps.content:
The line passes through the origin with a positive slope (rises from left to \right), so $y = \tfrac{7}{4}x$ (not $-\tfrac{7}{4}x$).

Both equations positive matches choice D — D is correct.
